full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 24.25 mL of AdF+++ medium, I used 500 uL Dispase, and 250 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 45 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 3 mL of AdF+++ medium, diluted 1:10 and counted the cells.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 9.02 E5

live: 6.3 E5

viability: 69.9 %

size: 8.3 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 8.46 E5

live: 6.53 E5

viability: 77.2 %

size: 8.6 um

Total cell count: 26.2 E6

Total volume: 3 mL

Overall # of cells in 3 mL was 26.2 E6. 1E6 cells were taken for staining, in 2 tubes each containing 0.5 E6 cells. The rest (25.2 E6) was seeded for experiment.
